description: A web-based tool to help users select an appropriate Creative Commons license for their work.
name: Creative Commons License Chooser

indicators.Fairness: measures Fairness by enabling appropriate selection of Creative Commons licenses, ensuring proper attribution, clear usage rights, and equitable sharing of research outputs.

useCases: Select appropriate Creative Commons licenses for research outputs
Ensure proper attribution and reuse conditions for shared work
Support open science practices through clear licensing of datasets and software
Facilitate compliant sharing and reuse of research materials
